---
title: "My Blog"
sidebar: false 
---



## 2 April 2026  UK Consulate Appointment

<p align="center">
<img src="https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/en/a/ae/Flag_of_the_United_Kingdom.svg" width="240">
</p>

Today I booked an appointment at the UK Consulate for 30 April 2026 for my visa application. 
Now I need to prepare the required documents and complete the application process. 
I hope everything goes well.




## 5 April 2026  Finished Dune
<p align="center">
![](https://64.media.tumblr.com/f41e1123b8d50a7f2d45cc0db908e019/48373677a5d8e217-56/s540x810/b68c960e8c9ba50d01925501e5268423f36efac7.gifv){width="346"}
</p>


Today I finished the first book of the Dune series by Frank Herbert. 
It was one of the most interesting science fiction books I have read. 
The story is not only about space and technology, but also politics, strategy, religion, and power. 
What I liked most about the book was the strategic thinking and long-term planning in the story. 
It was very different from a typical science fiction novel.

This book made me think about decision making, leadership, and systems, which are also related to industrial engineering in some ways. 
I am planning to continue with the second book of the series.
